     The Numbers Business Report

Arthur Christmas (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $46,462,469Details
International Box Office $101,092,774
Worldwide Box Office $147,555,243
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,074,899
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,866,934
Total $20,941,833
Further financial details...

Synopsis

3D, CG-animated family comedy Arthur Christmas, at last reveals the incredible, never-before seen answer to every child's question: 'So how does Santa deliver all those presents in one night?' The answer: Santa's exhilarating, ultra-high-tech operation hidden beneath the North Pole. But at the heart of the film is a story with the ingredients of a Christmas classic - a family in a state of comic dysfunction and an unlikely hero, Arthur, with an urgent mission that must be completed before Christmas morning dawns.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,068,931 (26.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.85 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$85,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,376 opening theaters/3,376 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $70,069,920

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2011 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 11th, 2011 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 7th, 2011 (Wide) (Spain)
November 26th, 2020 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: November 6th, 2012 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2189, 9/14/2011)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Father’s Footsteps
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Aardman Animations, Columbia Pictures, Sony Pictures Animation
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

3D, CG-animated family comedy Arthur Christmas, at last reveals the incredible, never-before seen answer to every child's question: 'So how does Santa deliver all those presents in one night?' The answer: Santa's exhilarating, ultra-high-tech operation hidden beneath the North Pole. But at the heart of the film is a story with the ingredients of a Christmas classic - a family in a state of comic dysfunction and an unlikely hero, Arthur, with an urgent mission that must be completed before Christmas morning dawns.
